title: Acknowledgments and InferenceX™ (formerly InferenceMAX) Initiative Supporters
title_translation: 致谢与 InferenceX™（原 InferenceMAX）倡议支持者

paragraphs.source: We would like to thank Jensen Huang and Ian Buck for supporting this open-source effort by providing access to the latest GB300 NVL72 systems along with access to servers representing all GPU SKUs that they have produced for the past four years. We would like to thank the Nvidia team for allowing us to conduct independent benchmarks across this close to 1000 GPUs. Thank you to Jatin Gangani, Kedar Potdar, Sridhar Ramaswamy, Ishan Dhanani, Sahithi Chigurupati, along with many other Nvidia inference engineers for helping to validate and optimize Blackwell & Hopper configurations.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: We would like to thank Jensen Huang and Ian Buck for supporting this open-source effort by providing access to the latest GB300 NVL72 systems along with access to servers representing all GPU SKUs that they have produced for the past four years. We would like to thank the Nvidia team for allowing us to conduct independent benchmarks across this close to 1000 GPUs. Thank you to Jatin Gangani, Kedar Potdar, Sridhar Ramaswamy, Ishan Dhanani, Sahithi Chigurupati, along with many other Nvidia inference engineers for helping to validate and optimize Blackwell & Hopper configurations.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: We would like to thank Jensen Huang and Ian Buck for supporting this open-source effort by providing access to the latest GB300 NVL72 systems along with access to servers representing all GPU SKUs that they have produced for the past four years. We would like to thank the Nvidia team for allowing us to conduct independent benchmarks across this close to 1000 GPUs. Thank you to Jatin Gangani, Kedar Potdar, Sridhar Ramaswamy, Ishan Dhanani, Sahithi Chigurupati, along with many other Nvidia inference engineers for helping to validate and optimize Blackwell & Hopper configurations.

pro.text: 我们在此感谢黄仁勋和 Ian Buck 对这项开源工作的鼎力支持，他们不仅为我们开放了最新 GB300 NVL72 机架级系统的访问权限，还提供了涵盖其过去四年生产的所有 GPU SKU 的服务器。我们要感谢英伟达团队允许我们在这近 1000 张 GPU 上开展独立基准测试。感谢 Jatin Gangani、Kedar Potdar、Sridhar Ramaswamy、Ishan Dhanani、Sahithi Chigurupati 以及众多其他英伟达推理工程师，协助我们验证并优化 Blackwell 与 Hopper (架构) 的配置。

applied_terms: Ensure professional courtesy in the tone of acknowledgments.
Translate 'Pushing Pareto Frontier' as '拓展帕累托前沿' or '推高帕累托前沿'.

understanding.role_in_article: Establishes the scale, legitimacy, and independence of the benchmark by crediting hardware providers.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Validates the explosive claims in the 'Key Observations' by revealing the massive scale of hardware access (1000+ GPUs).
understanding.relation_to_next: Closes the introductory/meta portion of the article, pivoting to the technical educational primer.
key_points: The authors had independent access to nearly 1000 GPUs, including the latest GB300 NVL72 systems, provided by Nvidia.
The benchmark pushes the 'Pareto Frontier' of open-source performance.
translation_notes: Ensure professional courtesy in the tone of acknowledgments.
Translate 'Pushing Pareto Frontier' as '拓展帕累托前沿' or '推高帕累托前沿'.

issues.description: 中英文排版规范问题：“系统”与“的”之间存在多余的半角空格，打断了中文的阅读连贯性。
“triage”在软件工程语境中通常指对 Bug 进行“分类、定级与初步排查”，直译为“故障分诊”带有过重的医疗色彩，不符合开发者社区习惯；此外，“专属 Bug”听起来像是一项产品特性，原意是指“仅在 AMD 平台上出现的 Bug”。
逻辑归类错误。Tri Dao 是个人（FlashAttention 的作者），而译文将其与 OpenAI、微软等并列，并统称为“等机构的专家”，这在逻辑上是不成立的。
中英文排版规范问题：“及”与“机器学习”之间存在多余的半角空格。

paragraphs.source: We’re also grateful to Lisa Su and Anush Elangovan for their support of InferenceMAX and for supporting our work with the dozens of AMD engineers like Chun, Andy, Bill, Ramine, Theresa, Parth, etc that contributed to InferenceMAX & upstream vLLM/SGLang bug fixes, as well as for their responsiveness on helping debug and triage AMD exclusive bugs so as to help optimize AMD performance.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: We’re also grateful to Lisa Su and Anush Elangovan for their support of InferenceMAX and for supporting our work with the dozens of AMD engineers like Chun, Andy, Bill, Ramine, Theresa, Parth, etc that contributed to InferenceMAX & upstream vLLM/SGLang bug fixes, as well as for their responsiveness on helping debug and triage AMD exclusive bugs so as to help optimize AMD performance.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: We’re also grateful to Lisa Su and Anush Elangovan for their support of InferenceMAX and for supporting our work with the dozens of AMD engineers like Chun, Andy, Bill, Ramine, Theresa, Parth, etc that contributed to InferenceMAX & upstream vLLM/SGLang bug fixes, as well as for their responsiveness on helping debug and triage AMD exclusive bugs so as to help optimize AMD performance.

pro.text: 我们同样感谢苏姿丰和 Anush Elangovan 对 InferenceMAX 的大力支持，并促成了我们与 Chun、Andy、Bill、Ramine、Theresa、Parth 等数十位 AMD 工程师的合作。这些工程师不仅为 InferenceMAX 及上游 vLLM/SGLang 的 Bug 修复贡献了力量，还在协助调试与分类排查 AMD 平台特有的 Bug 时展现了极高的响应速度，切实助力优化了 AMD 的性能。

understanding.relation_to_next: Closes the introductory/meta portion of the article, pivoting to the technical educational primer.
key_points: The authors had independent access to nearly 1000 GPUs, including the latest GB300 NVL72 systems, provided by Nvidia.
The benchmark pushes the 'Pareto Frontier' of open-source performance.

issues.description: 中英文排版规范问题：“系统”与“的”之间存在多余的半角空格，打断了中文的阅读连贯性。
“triage”在软件工程语境中通常指对 Bug 进行“分类、定级与初步排查”，直译为“故障分诊”带有过重的医疗色彩，不符合开发者社区习惯；此外，“专属 Bug”听起来像是一项产品特性，原意是指“仅在 AMD 平台上出现的 Bug”。
逻辑归类错误。Tri Dao 是个人（FlashAttention 的作者），而译文将其与 OpenAI、微软等并列，并统称为“等机构的专家”，这在逻辑上是不成立的。
中英文排版规范问题：“及”与“机器学习”之间存在多余的半角空格。

paragraphs.source: We also want to recognize the SGLang, vLLM, and TensorRT-LLM maintainers for building a world-class software stack and open sourcing it to the entire world. You can check their articles on InferenceX here:
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: We also want to recognize the SGLang, vLLM, and TensorRT-LLM maintainers for building a world-class software stack and open sourcing it to the entire world. You can check their articles on InferenceX here:
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: We also want to recognize the SGLang, vLLM, and TensorRT-LLM maintainers for building a world-class software stack and open sourcing it to the entire world. You can check their articles on InferenceX here:

pro.text: 我们还要特别鸣谢 SGLang、vLLM 和 TensorRT-LLM 的维护者，他们构建了世界级软件栈并将其全面开源。您可以在此查看他们关于 InferenceX 的文章：

paragraphs.source: The InferenceX initiative is also supported by many major buyers of compute and prominent members of the ML community including those from OpenAI, Microsoft, vLLM, Tri Dao, PyTorch Foundation, Oracle and more. You can find the full list here.

inline_elements.text: You can find the full list here

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The InferenceX initiative is also supported by many major buyers of compute and prominent members of the ML community including those from OpenAI, Microsoft, vLLM, Tri Dao, PyTorch Foundation, Oracle and more. [You can find the full list here](https://inferencemax.semianalysis.com/quotes).
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The InferenceX initiative is also supported by many major buyers of compute and prominent members of the ML community including those from OpenAI, Microsoft, vLLM, Tri Dao, PyTorch Foundation, Oracle and more. You can find the full list here.

parent_inline_elements.text: You can find the full list here

pro.text: InferenceX 计划还得到了众多核心算力买家及机器学习 (ML) 社区重量级成员的支持，包括来自 OpenAI、微软、vLLM、PyTorch 基金会、甲骨文等机构的专家，以及 Tri Dao 等个人。点击此处查看完整名单。
pro.tokenized_text: InferenceX 计划还得到了众多核心算力买家及机器学习 (ML) 社区重量级成员的支持，包括来自 OpenAI、微软、vLLM、PyTorch 基金会、甲骨文等机构的专家，以及 Tri Dao 等个人。[[[LINK_1|点击此处查看完整名单]]]。
